title: Maribel y la extraña familia
writer: Miguel Mihura, Luis Marquina, Vicente Coello
actors: Silvia Pinal, Adolfo Marsillach, Julia Caba Alba
plot: Marcelino's earnest wish is to marry Maribel, a former prostitute. When she gets to know his elderly mother and aunt, however, strange things concerning Marcelino's first wife start to arise.
